---
title: "Defaults (pill 40, continuous), HintDimOpacity, transparent status — plan/report"
author: "Yun Jiang"
date: "2026-07-22"
format:
  html:
    html-math-method: mathjax
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <link rel="icon" href="data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 100 100'><text y='.9em' font-size='90'>🏷️</text></svg>">
---

# Changes

1. **Pill opacity default 80 → 40** (`HintPillOpacity`). App.config, `ReadHintPillOpacity`
   (percent 40 / fallback 0.4), `HintCanvas.DefaultPillOpacity` 0.4, Options default "40".
2. **Continuous is the default trigger mode** (`OverlayTriggerMode=Continuous`). App.config,
   `ReadTriggerMode` default (both the `ParseTriggerMode` arg and the catch fallback),
   Options default "Continuous". `ShellViewModel` already derives the initial state from
   `ReadTriggerMode()`, so no change there; Automation still one-shot.
3. **Transparent status strip**: bottom-center `StackPanel` `Opacity="0.75"` so the badges
   don't fully obscure content. Fixed (not configurable).
4. **New `HintDimOpacity` config** (percent 0-100, default 20) — the backtick dim level,
   which the user has been tuning for dark-bg readability. `ReadHintDimOpacity` (reuses
   `ParsePercent`), `OverlayViewModel._dimOpacity` (replaces the old `const DimOpacity`),
   Options VM + dialog row.

# Exploration: other config-worthy settings

Surveyed hard-coded values in the overlay code (`HintCanvas.Pad`/corner-radius/font
family, badge colors/sizes, status-strip margins). Only `DimOpacity` had real user impact
(directly tied to the dim readability work), so only it was promoted to a config key. The
rest are aesthetic and not worth config-key bloat. `ParseTriggerMode`'s unit test passes
its own default explicitly, so changing the app default did not break it.

# Files

`App.config`, `Services/OverlayActionConfig.cs`, `ViewModels/OverlayViewModel.cs`,
`Views/HintCanvas.cs`, `Views/OverlayView.xaml`, `ViewModels/OptionsViewModel.cs`,
`Views/OptionsView.xaml`, `CLAUDE.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`.

# Verification

CI compile + xUnit green. Runtime (Windows): pills dimmer (α≈0.4) with crisp text; overlay
opens continuous by default; status strip semi-transparent; backtick dims to the
configured level; Options exposes HintPillOpacity + HintDimOpacity.
